recommendations.title: Midnight Run
recommendations.overview: A bounty hunter pursues a former Mafia accountant who is also being chased by a rival bounty hunter, the F.B.I., and his old mob boss after jumping bail.

recommendations.title: Trigun: Badlands Rumble
recommendations.overview: In a quicksand surrounded town called Makka, rumors spread of a legendary robber named Gasback is after the town. To protect it, Mayor Kepler has hired bounty hunters. These hunters have been following Gasback from town to town in hopes of getting th

recommendations.title: Django Unchained
recommendations.overview: With the help of a German bounty hunter, a freed slave sets out to rescue his wife from a brutal Mississippi plantation owner.

recommendations.title: The Hunter
recommendations.overview: During his long career, bounty hunter Ralph "Papa" Thorson has caught over 5,000 criminals. Now, while he is working on apprehending fugitives in Illinois, Texas and Nebraska, he himself is being hunted by a psychotic killer.

recommendations.title: Domino
recommendations.overview: The story of the life of Domino Harvey, who abandoned her career as a Ford model to become a bounty hunter.

recommendations.title: Cowboy Bebop: The Movie
recommendations.overview: The year is 2071. Following a terrorist bombing, a deadly virus is released on the populace of Mars and the government has issued the largest bounty in history, for the capture of whoever is behind it. The bounty hunter crew of the spaceship Bebop; S

recommendations.title: Battle Angel
recommendations.overview: In his travels as a bounty hunter, Hunter–Warrior and cyborg healer Ido one day discovers and repairs the remnants of a cyborg whom he names Gally. Though possessing the body of a young woman, Gally now embodies Ido's most sophisticated and lethal cy

recommendations.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
recommendations.overview: Nick Randall is a Los Angeles-based bounty hunter and an ex-CIA operative who is asked by a former co-worker to help track down terrorist Malak Al Rahim. However, Malak Al Rahim is also looking for Randall, forcing a showdown on the waterfront.

recommendations.title: The Condemned 2
recommendations.overview: A former bounty hunter who finds himself on the run as part of a revamped Condemned tournament, in which convicts are forced to fight each other to the death as part of a game that's broadcast to the public.

recommendations.title: Kites
recommendations.overview: A wounded man searches for his sweetheart in the Mexican desert while on the run from the police, bounty hunters, and others.
